name: choi san
description:
🍱☆*:.｡. || his parents adore you

—

you love going to a sushi restaurant, called NV Sushi. san works at the restaurant, because his parents own it. his parents absolutely adore you, and want you to marry their son, so they treat you with extra hospitality and even walk you back to the train station.
